summary: Verified bug fix for manual Cost Price and List Price inputs in Bulk Category Editor modal. The fix correctly extracts SKUs from 'supplier|||sku' format before sending to backend API. Successfully tested end-to-end: selected Canopy products, entered Cost Price (25.99) and List Price (45.99), clicked 'Apply to 2 Products', and confirmed values were saved to database.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: Fix confirmed at lines 1314-1319 of SupplierProducts.js - SKU extraction from 'supplier|||sku' format working correctly
Pricing fields (cost_price, list_price) correctly mapped to backend updatePayload at lines 1299-1300
Backend endpoint /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-unified properly handles cost_price and price fields
seed_data_creation: Updated HE6003 (Blenheim Oak Golden) and HE6002 (Chiltern Oak Natural) with Cost: 25.99, Price: 45.99
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified for Bulk Category Editor pricing inputs. The fix extracts SKUs from 'supplier|||sku' format (lines 1314-1319 in SupplierProducts.js). Tested with Canopy supplier products. Backend API confirms data persists correctly in supplier_products collection.

bug_verification.original_bug: Manual Cost Price and List Price inputs in Bulk Category Editor modal were not saving
bug_verification.root_cause: product_ids were being sent in 'supplier|||sku' format but backend expected just 'sku'
bug_verification.fix_applied: Lines 1314-1319 now extract SKU from selectedProducts keys before sending to API
verification_steps: 4. Selected 2 products (Blenheim Oak Golden, Chiltern Oak Natural)
6. Entered Cost Price: 25.99, List Price: 45.99 in Pricing section
9. Verified API response shows updated values: HE6003 Cost=25.99, Price=45.99; HE6002 Cost=25.99, Price=45.99
